entity.summary: Estonia-based centralized cryptocurrency and digital-asset exchange supporting crypto-to-crypto and fiat-to-crypto trading, wallets, listings, IEOs, OTC services, and transfers.
entity.notes: HEI uses 2018-10-26 as the first verified public-operation date because ATAIX published its exchange workflow, an active XLM listing, and its Estonian licensing announcement on that date. The current first-party help center and trading links remained available in June 2026.

events.title: ATAIX entered verified public operation
events.description: ATAIX was publicly operating as a centralized digital-asset exchange with one-click conversion and live cryptocurrency listings.
events.notes: This is the earliest verified public-operation marker recovered from first-party materials.

events.title: ATAIX operator announced two Estonian crypto licenses
events.description: EuroToken OÜ, the European operator of ATAIX, announced licenses for virtual-currency exchange and wallet services.
events.notes: Recorded as a historical regulatory milestone rather than a claim about the present legal status of those licenses.

evidence.title: One-click Exchange
evidence.notes: First-party article documents an operational one-click exchange service on October 26, 2018.

evidence.title: Stellar's Lumens now listed on ATAIX
evidence.notes: First-party listing announcement confirms users could trade XLM on ATAIX by the selected launch marker.

evidence.title: ATAIX granted with two crypto licenses
evidence.notes: First-party announcement identifies EuroToken OÜ and the two Estonian service-license categories.

evidence.title: What is ATAIX?
evidence.notes: Current first-party FAQ defines ATAIX as a centralized exchange and links its trading, markets, fees, OTC, IEO, listing, and API services.

evidence.title: ATAIX trading platform
evidence.notes: The first-party trading entry point remained linked from ATAIX's current 2026 help center.
